user.title: QR Code Reader
user.description: Choose the camera and how often to scan. Enable at least one preprocessing path.

data_description.entity_id: Camera that provides still frames for decoding.
data_description.name: If empty, the entity name is generated automatically (e.g. QR driveway).
data_description.scan_interval: Seconds between automatic snapshots. Use 0 for no automatic scans; trigger image_processing.scan manually when needed.
data_description.use_original: Try reading a QR code from the frame first, without preprocessing.
data_description.use_grayscale_enhancements: Try basic image improvements before scanning (autocontrast, histogram equalize, Otsu threshold).
data_description.use_scaled: Try multiple rescaled versions; CPU-heavy. Only for very poor images on capable hardware.
data_description.qr_only: When enabled, only QR codes are decoded; other barcode types are skipped.

error.pipeline_required: Enable at least one preprocessing group (original image, grayscale enhancements, or scaled).

init.title: QR Code Reader options
init.description: Adjust scanning behavior. Enable at least one preprocessing path.

data_description.qr_only: When enabled, only QR codes are decoded; other barcode types are skipped.
